name: Homemade Pie Crust (Top and Bottom)
method: In a large bowl, sift salt and flour together. Add sugar and mix well. Cut in softened butter, some people use knives, I use my hands. When the butter is thoroughly mixed and the flour resembles course crumbs, mix in 1-2 T cold water until the dough is moist and you can form 2 balls. On a floured cutting board, roll out dough to 8-inches and place carefully at the bottom of pie plate. Fill with desired filling and add top carefully. Trim excess dough and flute edges. Put a couple of fork marks in the center. Place in freezer for 5 minutes and bake according to filling recipe instructions, I have added a few of my favorites following this recipe. Makes one 8 inch top and bottom, but if you only need the bottom you can divide the recipe in half. Serves 4. Olé
